mapper.insert: insert into agri_pest_platform.crop(name, category, intro, description, image_url) values (#{name}, #{category}, #{intro}, #{description}, #{imageUrl})
mapper.update:
update crop
name = #{name}, category = #{category},
intro = #{intro},
description = #{description},
image_url = #{imageUrl},
where id = #{id} and delete_flag = 0
mapper.select:
select id, name, category, intro, image_url, gmt_create from crop
and name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
and category like concat('%',#{category},'%')
order by gmt_modified desc
SELECT id, name, category, intro, description, image_url, delete_flag, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM agri_pest_platform.crop WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
SELECT id, name, category, intro, description, image_url, delete_flag, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM agri_pest_platform.crop WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
